instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the COLORS tokens from /app/frontend/src/constants/colors.js. Do not introduce new hex codes. Keep the 3-column modal layout. Use only lucide-react icons. Do not introduce new fonts. Follow the structure of existing InputField, SelectField, and FileField. Use shadcn/ui for Dialog, Popover, Tooltip, and Toast. Implement data-testid on every interactive element.

tokens.input: text-sm text-[COLORS.darkText] bg-transparent outline-none flex-1 min-w-0

tokens.default: border-dashed border-[COLORS.borderGray] text-[COLORS.primaryOrange] bg-transparent rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-xs flex items-center gap-1.5 w-fit
